name: Runsystem Co.,Ltd.
summary: Runsystem Co.,Ltd. engages in the store management business in Japan. The company also engages in the operation of amusement facilities, such as billiards, darts, table tennis, and karaoke rooms, as well as relaxation systems; and provides real estate management services. In addition, it offers child development support services and day service after school services; and sells food. The company was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
